intent: AI conversation history list showing multiple threads. Supports create, archive, and delete operations.

blacklist.description: Do not override styles matching pattern ^(rounded|gap-)
Do not override styles matching pattern ^(bg|text)-(muted|accent|destructive|popover)
Do not override styles matching pattern ^(z-|fixed|absolute)

aiPrompt: Use ThreadList from @/components/base. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.

examples.title: Sidebar + Thread List
